Home Products ASTM Certified Baby Stroller
MOQ: 50 PCS ASTM F833-23 CPC

ASTM Certified Baby Stroller

High-performance travel stroller with one-hand fold in 2 seconds. ASTM F833-23 & EN 1888 certified, 247+ export batches with zero return rate. Ideal for retailers targeting on-the-go families.

247+
Export Batches
0%
Return Rate
4
Markets

Target Markets:

United States Canada European Union Australia

Get Quotation Now

Sample Lead Time: 3-7 days
Production Lead Time: 15-25 days
Request Quote

Product Specifications

Material Aluminum alloy frame + 600D Oxford fabric
Weight 6.5kg (net weight)
Folded Size 55 × 30 × 40cm
Unfolded Size 85 × 55 × 100cm
Maximum Load 25kg
Suitable Age 6-36 months
Wheel Size 6 inch EVA front / 7 inch PVC rear
Brakes Foot brake on rear wheels

Key Features

  • One-hand fold system - fold in 2 seconds
  • 5-point safety harness with shoulder pads
  • Adjustable recline (3 positions)
  • Adjustable handle height (5 positions)
  • Large storage basket (capacity 5kg)
  • UV protection canopy with peek-a-boo window
  • Front wheels with 360° swivel + lock
  • JPMA/ASTM certified

OEM/ODM Customization Options

Logo Printing: Available - Silk screen, embroidery
Color Options: 15+ colors available
Packaging: Custom retail box or mail box
MOQ for Custom Color: 100 units
Sample Customization: Available
Learn more about OEM/ODM services

Certifications & Testing

ASTM F833-23
CPC
EN 1888
ISO 9001

Application Scenarios

Daily use
Travel
Shopping
Outdoor activities

Business Information

Payment Terms

T/T 30% deposit, 70% against copy of B/L

Shipping & Trade

FOB Shanghai

Loading Port: Shanghai, China

Container Load

20' GP: 1200 pcs

40' GP: 2500 pcs

40' HQ: 2900 pcs

QC Process

IQC (incoming) → IPQC (production line) → FQC (final assembly) → OQC (container loading check). 100% inspection on safety and function.

After-sales Policy

12-month warranty against manufacturing defects. Free replacement parts for quality issues within warranty period.

Frequently Asked Questions

What certifications do these strollers have?
All strollers have ASTM F833-23, CPC, EN 1888, and ISO 9001 certification. We can provide test reports upon request.
Can I customize the color and packaging?
Yes! We offer 15+ color options, custom logo printing, and custom packaging design. MOQ for custom color is 100 units.
What is the sample lead time?
Standard samples take 3-7 days. Customized samples take 7-10 days depending on requirements.

Ready to Source This Product?

Get a free quotation with detailed pricing, sample availability, and customized solutions for your brand.
